name: FBR Expenses Detail
query:
SELECT
  ec.name AS "Expense Claim:Link/Expense Claim:170",
  ec.posting_date AS "Date:Date:95",
  ec.employee AS "Employee:Link/Employee:130",
  ec.employee_name AS "Employee Name:Data:160",
  ec.company AS "Company:Link/Company:170",
  ec.status AS "Status:Data:110",
  ec.total_claimed_amount AS "Claimed Amount:Currency:140",
  ec.total_sanctioned_amount AS "Sanctioned Amount:Currency:150",
  ec.total_taxes_and_charges AS "Taxes & Charges:Currency:130",
  ec.grand_total AS "Grand Total:Currency:130"
FROM `tabExpense Claim` ec
WHERE ec.docstatus = 1
  AND ec.posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
ORDER BY ec.posting_date DESC, ec.name DESC;
